channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: BeXide announces Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators for Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out in 2026.

BeXide has announced Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators, a revival of the 1995-released SEGA Saturn game by KAZe. It will launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam in 2026.

Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators first launched for SEGA Saturn on June 23, 1995 in Japan, followed by September 1995 in Europe and November 1995 in North America. An updated version Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators Ver. 9.7, was released on September 11, 1997 in Japan. In 2010, BeXide released an iOS port called Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators Ver. 2010.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

1995. The legendary digital pinball game Last Gladiators, originally released for a home console to worldwide acclaim, makes its triumphant return to console and PC—30 years in the making!

Realistic ball and flipper physics! Polished, stunning graphics!

  • Every timeless element faithfully and completely ported to PC, based on Ver9.7—the ultimate version!
  • Controls optimized for PC—play comfortably with intuitive controls.
  • A high-quality entertainment experience crafted for mature players.

What do the last warriors—the “Last Gladiators”—fight for?

Last Gladiators features four pinball tables, each inspired by the story of four warriors reincarnated across 2,000 years of time and space, beginning in ancient Rome.

  • Gladiators – Ancient Roman gladiators fighting for their freedom.
  • Knight of the Roses – A legendary knight’s battle to save the world.
  • Dragon Showdown – A feudal lord of the East fighting for supreme dominance.
  • Warlock – The final holy war to seal away humanity’s endless history of conflict.

Each of the four uniquely themed pinball tables is structured with nine rounds plus a Final Round.

Players advance through the game following each table’s story.

All four pinball tables will put your skills to the ultimate test.

Welcome to the Bloody Arena.

Put an end to two thousand years of war, Last Gladiators.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/bexide-announces-digital-pinball-last-gladiators-for-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Roguelite strategy deckbuilder auto-battler Sangokushi BOND launches this summer
item.content:encoded:
• PC

By former SEGA producer Yasuhiro Nishiyama.

Roguelite strategy deckbuilder auto-battler Sangokushi BOND, produced by former SEGA producer Yasuhiro Nishiyama, will launch for PC via Steam this summer for $7.99 / 800 yen, developer Get Wrapped Up announced. It will support English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options, as well as two-player online multiplayer.

Sangokushi BOND will be playable at BitSummit PUNCH, which will run from May 22 to 24 at Miyako Messe in Kyoto, Japan. A Steam playtest will also run from May 22 at 18:00 JST to May 26 at 18:00 JST.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Master the chaos. Execute the perfect strategy. Outsmart them all. From the legendary Japanese creator Yasuhiro Nishiyama (former SEGA producer of Sangokushi Taisen and maimai). Recruit generals from an ever-changing roster to forge unbreakable bonds (BOND).

Forget the “Meta“: Roguelite “Full Draft” System

  • Roguelite Recruitment – Every match in Sangokushi BOND begins with a fresh set of possibilities. Navigate a boardgame-style map to recruit your generals and build a unique army from the hand you are dealt.
  • Dynamic Teambuilding – Players must adapt to randomized pools while managing costs, the only guaranteed path to victory is your strategy. No two battles play out the same, discover powerful formations and outsmart your opponent with a plan that only works in that moment!
  • Strategic Cost Management – Carry over resources for future rounds.
  • Risk for Reward – Pick weaker units early to build late-game power.
  • Unique Tactical Synergies – Build “miracle formations” that only work in the moment.

No fixed strategies, no “Meta” sites. Every match sparks a completely new strategy.

Ultimate Mind Games: Find the “Perfect Placement“

Victory is decided before the clash begins. Study your opponent’s formation in advance and place your generals on the grid-based battlefield to counter their strategy. Success depends on reading unit counters, skill ranges, and potential for ambushes.

Three pillars unit counters:

  • Cavalry → Strong against Archers
  • Archers → Strong against Spears
  • Spears → Strong against Cavalry

“Hide Cavalry behind Spears for a surprise charge. ”

“Use high-INT generals to reveal hidden ambushes. ”

The pre-battle placement is the ultimate highlight of the experience.

Once deployment ends, the fight plays out entirely on the accuracy of your strategy and positioning – ultimately your decisions as battlefield commander.

Build Your Dream Team: The “Ultimate BOND” Experience

Over 100 all-new, originally illustrated generals. Cross-faction combos trigger powerful “BOND” synergies.

Combine your deck’s strategy with powerful Tactical Decrees to unleash unpredictable combos and experience the pure exhilaration of overturning the entire board.

10-Minute Deep Strategy: Intense Battles, Two Ways to Play

  • Synchronous Battles – The high-stakes tension of real-time mind games.
  • Asynchronous Battles – Challenge elite formations from across the nation at your own pace.

Skip the grind and hours of endless gameplay. Make your strategic decisions based on the hand you are dealt, and command your army in intense 10-minute “think first” tactical battles. Designed for a busy lifestyle.

Fair and Logical Balance: Every Loss is a Lesson

  • Zero “RNG” Frustration – There are no unfair, luck-based elements. Every win or loss has a clear reason behind it.
  • Intellectual Growth – The more you play, the more your tactics evolve—delivering a deep sense of strategic evolution.

Outsmart rivals across the globe with nothing but your wits!

  • Global Matching – Compete with players across Japan, Asia, and the West.

The throne is yours to take!

Authentic Tactical Battles, Presented by a Legendary Producer.

Produced by Yasuhiro Nishiyama (Nishi-P), the former SEGA producer behind massive hits such as Sangokushi Taisen and maimai.

Where arcade passion meets strategic depth. A new Three Kingdoms experience, forged on the front lines of arcade gaming.

Watch a new pair of trailers below. Visit the official website here.

Official Trailer

English

Japanese

Simplified Chinese

Concept Overview

English

Japanese

Simplified Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/roguelite-strategy-deckbuilder-auto-battler-sangokushi-bond-launches-this-summer

item.title: Neptunia Unlimited opening movie
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Featuring the theme song "Yuusei no Singularity."

Compile Heart has released the opening movie for Neptunia Unlimited, its next mainline entry in the Neptunia series.

The opening movie features the theme song “Yuusei no Singularity,” with vocals and lyrics by nao, and composition and arrangement by YOFFY.

Neptunia Unlimited is due out for for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and Switch on August 27 in Japan.

Watch the opening movie below.

Opening Movie



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/neptunia-unlimited-opening-movie
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PiXEL announces 10th anniversary game The Adventure of Noce
item.content:encoded:
A single walnut does not rattle in a sack.

PiXEL has announced The Adventure of Noce, its 10th anniversary commemoration game.

The game will feature character design and art direction by illustrator and manga artist Hiroshi Fuji, who has previously worked on titles like The Adventure of Valkyrie, The Legend of Valkyrie, and Mei Rou Yakata no Chana.

Further information about the project will be announced at PiXEL‘s 10th anniversary event on May 23 at 19:00 JST.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/pixel-announces-10th-anniversary-game-the-adventure-of-noce
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wizards of the Coast cancels Giant Skull’s Dungeons & Dragons action adventure game
item.content:encoded:
Stig Asmussen assures, "Things are good at Giant Skull."

Wizards of the Coast has canceled a publishing agreement with Giant Skull, the studio established by Star Wars Jedi series and God of War III director Stig Asmussen, for an original Dungeons & Dragons action adventure game first announced in June 2025.

“We assess concepts at every stage of development,” a spokesperson for Wizards of the Coast told Bloomberg, adding that the company was still taking new pitches from Giant Skull.

The spokesperson continued, “While we decided not to pursue an early concept from Giant Skull, we have great respect for Stig Asmussen and his team and value our ongoing relationship.”

The cancelation took place alongside a larger reorganization at Wizards of the Coast, which included the closure of subsidiary Atomic Arcade.

Asmussen told Bloomberg that he enjoyed working with Wizards of the Coast, and that he is still talking to people there and at other companies about potential new publishing deals.

“Things are good at Giant Skull,” he said.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/wizards-of-the-coast-cancels-giant-skulls-dungeons-dragons-action-adventure-game
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dark Scrolls delayed to June 22
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

No longer due out on May 28.

Publisher Devolver Digital and developer doinksoft have delayed fantasy-themed side-scrolling action platformer Dark Scrolls from its previously planned May 28 release date by three weeks to June 22. It will be available for Switch and PC via Steam.

In a statement, Devolver Digital said, “You know when we said we were releasing Devolver Digital and Doinksoft‘s Dark Scrolls on May 28 for PC and Switch? Ya know, the super rad, pixelated fantasy-themed action platformer that fuses shmup-style chaos with roguelite progression? We actually meant June 22, and it’s nothing to do with our friends at Yacht Club Games announcing that Mina the Hollower would be launching a day later on May 29. Nothing at all.”

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Dark Scrolls is a fantasy-themed action platformer that fuses shoot ’em up-style chaos with roguelite progression and is packed with charm, challenge, and secrets.

Set forth on your quest to [INSERT GOAL HERE] with one of the worthy yet quirky heroes in solo or cooperative play, local and online. Hack, slash, and dodge through hordes of enemies and deadly traps in procedurally generated runs of hand-crafted rooms and levels using each hero’s unique attacks and abilities to your advantage.

Sharp reflexes and split-second decisions are crucial to survival as the intensity ratchets up as each run delivers new surprises, branching paths, and unrelenting bosses to conquer. Gobble up coins to spend at Bruce & Goose’s Shoppe as you take a breath from the action to gain new perks, devastating attacks and summoned allies. Stack them right, and you’ll unleash screen-filling destruction of arcade legend.

Keep an eye out for secrets among the chaos as this land holds many mysteries with new paths and locations, new heroes to rescue and add to your roster, and more…

Key Features

  • Double Trouble – Charge forth alone or bring a co-op buddy to tackle dungeons together, combine powerful attacks and revive one another if you fall in battle.
  • Choose Your Own Adventure – Each run offers hand-crafted screens, unique bosses, and evolving routes shaped by player choices and quests.
  • Rogue’s Gallery – Unlock nine distinctive heroes with unique skills, side objectives, and customizable trinkets that alter gameplay.
  • Arcade Alchemy – Chain perks and elemental powers through combat performance for explosive, high-reward playstyles.

Watch a new trailer below.

New Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/dark-scrolls-delayed-to-june-22
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: World of Tanks: HEAT launches May 26
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Free-to-play alternate post-World War II tactical vehicle shooter dated.

Free-to-play alternate post-World War II tactical vehicle shooter World of Tanks: HEAT will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on May 26, developer Waraming announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Wargaming:

World of Tanks: HEAT is built from the ground up on a new proprietary engine developed in-house by Wargaming. This technology delivers modern visuals and immersive environments while enabling fast, responsive gameplay optimized for smooth performance across a wide range of hardware.

At launch, players can expect:

  • Eight Agents – Three battlefield roles: Defender, Assault, and Marksman. Each Agent commands a lethal two-vehicle roster, with each vehicle tailored to its role in combat.
  • Fifteen Vehicles – Every vehicle supports a different playstyle and can be fully customized through modules and equipment. Whether holding the frontline or striking from a distance, there’s a tank that is ready for the job.
  • Eight Maps – The battlefields span a wide range of biomes, settings, and visual styles, each designed to support multiple playstyles across game modes.
  • Four Player-Versus-Player Modes – Hardpoint, Control, Kill Confirmed, and Conquest are available.

World of Tanks: HEAT will be available across PC (Wargaming Game Center and Steam), Steam Deck, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and NVIDIA GeForce NOW, supporting full cross-platform play and progression.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/world-of-tanks-heat-launches-may-26
